recurringTransitionDevice: The work packet persists while the main metaphor changes.

internalTransitions.action: Retain title, concept rail, and work packet; update the main metaphor and right-panel copy.
internalTransitions.validation: A screenshot 0.3 seconds before and after the transition should show continuity rather than a visual reset.
